title: Bitter Confit Chicken with Tomato
description: A savory and slightly bitter dish made with confit chicken, tomatoes, and a hint of syrian spice.

ingredients.name: Syrian Spice Blend
ingredients.notes: Available at most middle eastern stores

ingredients.name: Bitter
ingredients.notes: Bitter greens such as endive or radicchio

instructions: In a large bowl, mix together the confit chicken, chopped tomatoes, Syrian spice blend, and a pinch of salt and pepper.
Spread the mixture onto a baking sheet and roast in the oven for 15-20 minutes, or until the chicken is heated through and the tomatoes are tender.
Meanwhile, chop the bitter greens and mix with the friendly herbs.
To serve, place a portion of the chicken and tomato mixture onto a plate, top with the bitter and friendly greens, and serve immediately.
